system.description: A weird agent with the supernatural ability to shift into the form of other humanoids. This archetype demonstrates the weird agent power system: powers cost 1 Cool die to activate, add to a base skill (Athletics or Contact), and don't earn franchise dice on successes.

power.name: Shapeshift
power.description: Transform into the form of another humanoid you've studied. Lasts until you transform again or fall unconscious.

characteristics.text: Can only maintain one form at a time
Maintains physical limitations of the form (height, mass)
